RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER COMMUNITIES FOR A BETTER ENVIRONMENT'S Petition For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate And Complaint For Declaratory And Injuctive Relief: OFF CALENDAR for failure to file pleadings pursuant to their stipulation filed on 8/12/04. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
